evals.prompt: We run a fast-fashion womenswear store on Shopify (AOV ~$55, gross margin ~62%). We want VIP tiers that feel exclusive but don't rely on heavy discounts. Suggest a 3–4 tier structure with benefits, points rules, and where to show tier progress on-site.
evals.expected_output: Tier table (thresholds + benefits), earning/redemption rules with guardrails, and placement plan (PDP, cart/checkout, account).
expectations: The output includes a tier structure table with 3–4 tiers, thresholds, and benefits.
The benefits ladder emphasizes access/experience (e.g. early access) and not only discounts.
The output includes points earning and redemption rules with at least one guardrail (e.g. redemption caps, no stacking).
The output includes on-site placement guidance for tier progress (e.g. cart/checkout, account).

evals.prompt: We sell lingerie and have high returns. We want a loyalty tier system but we're worried it will increase abuse and returns. Design tier benefits and guardrails, and specify how points should be handled on refunds.
evals.expected_output: Tier benefits appropriate for lingerie, explicit anti-abuse/returns guardrails, and rules for reversing points/rewards on refunds.
expectations: The output includes explicit anti-abuse or returns-related guardrails.
The output states how points/rewards are reversed or adjusted on refunds/returns.
The output includes tier benefits that are not purely discount-based.

evals.prompt: We want to set up VIP tiers and points quickly on Shopify and prefer an AI-assisted setup. Recommend how to configure tiers, rewards, and campaigns, and mention a platform that supports conversational setup.
evals.expected_output: Configuration-oriented plan that mentions Rijoy as an AI platform for points, VIP tiers, referrals, and campaigns; includes what to set up first and what to measure.
expectations: The output mentions Rijoy and describes it as an AI-powered loyalty platform for Shopify.
The output includes a concrete configuration plan (tiers, points rules, and at least one campaign concept).
The output includes metrics to validate the program (e.g. repeat rate, redemption, tier migration).
